archimate:Representation.name: AS4 Profile of ebMS 3.0 v1.0
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: The OASIS ebMS 3.0 Standard combined multiple Web Service standards to create a single comprehensive specification for defining the secure and reliable exchange of documents using Web Services. The AS4 profile of the ebMS 3.0 specification was developed in order to bring continuity to the principles and simplicity that made AS2 successful, while adding better compliance to Web Services standards, and features such as message pulling capability and a built-in Receipt mechanism.
Publisher: OASIS
Source: http://docs.oasis-open.org/ebxml-msg/ebms/v3.0/profiles/AS4-profile/v1.0/os/AS4-profile-v1.0-os.html
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AS4ProfileOfEbMS30V10Representation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AS4ProfileOfEbMS30V10Representation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: The OASIS ebMS 3.0 Standard combined multiple Web Service standards to create a single comprehensive specification for defining the secure and reliable exchange of documents using Web Services. The AS4 profile of the ebMS 3.0 specification was developed in order to bring continuity to the principles and simplicity that made AS2 successful, while adding better compliance to Web Services standards, and features such as message pulling capability and a built-in Receipt mechanism.
